steps.title: Convert the percent
steps.content:
Write $34\%$ as a fraction and multiply by $100$.
$$34\%=\frac{34}{100}$$
$$\frac{34}{100}\cdot100=34$$

steps.title: Match the value
steps.content: Since the base is $100$, the percent value is the same number. $34\%$ of $100$ is $34$. The answer is A.
